description: Material Passport for Gate 3.5 — Results Quality Gate. Tracks the 9-item blocking quality gate between Stage 3 and Stage 4.

required_artifacts.name: 结果质量门闸报告
required_artifacts.description: Complete report of 9 results quality checks with pass/warn/fail status for each item.

required_artifacts.name: 数值验证报告
required_artifacts.description: Automated checks on all numeric outputs: range validity, decimal precision, consistency across tables.

required_artifacts.name: 可复现性检查
required_artifacts.description: Verification that re-running analysis code produces identical results.

quality_gates.name: SAP合规性
quality_gates.description: All SAP-specified analyses executed; deviations documented with justification.

quality_gates.name: P值合理性
quality_gates.description: All p-values in [0,1]; no p=0.000 (should be <0.001); consistency with test statistics.

quality_gates.name: 置信区间一致性
quality_gates.description: CIs consistent with point estimates and p-values; width plausible for sample size.

quality_gates.name: 样本量一致性
quality_gates.description: N in analysis matches N in data; subgroup Ns sum correctly; no unexplained attrition.

quality_gates.name: 图表数据一致性
quality_gates.description: Numbers in tables match numbers in figures; no conflicting results across outputs.

quality_gates.name: 效应量合理性
quality_gates.description: Effect sizes are within plausible ranges for the clinical domain.

quality_gates.name: 语言一致性
quality_gates.description: All code uses the same language (R or Python) as locked in SAP.

quality_gates.name: 代码可复现
quality_gates.description: Analysis code runs from clean state without errors; random seeds set.

quality_gates.name: 偏差日志完整
quality_gates.description: All SAP deviations documented with impact assessment.
